message:
fix(packs/redis): block SHUTDOWN NOSAVE — more dangerous variant was unguarded

The SHUTDOWN pattern used a negative lookahead (?!\s+NOSAVE) that
excluded SHUTDOWN NOSAVE from being flagged. But NOSAVE is the MORE
dangerous variant — it exits without saving in-memory data to disk.
Remove the lookahead so all SHUTDOWN variants are blocked.

Also updates pattern_audit expected set since the regex no longer
requires backtracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
